title: Mirror column says "1 Item" on mobile instead of actual "number"

posts.author: JustinB1994 (Justin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Guys,

Currently trying to implement Monday.com onto Samsung tablets for our manufacturing guys.

I am having an annoying issue of the mirror column populating incorrect information, instead of a part number it just says “1 item” which has to be clicked on to see the part number.(just an extra click for the guys out in manufacturing.) I did temporarily fix the issue by duplicating the page and relinking the mirror columns, but I don’t wish to do this consistently.

Screenshot below of my Samsung Galaxy S10

Screenshot_20220304-085351_mondaycom1080×2280 157 KB

Screenshot_20220304-085400_mondaycom1080×2280 156 KB

If anyone has a fix for this issue i can make a start rolling Monday.com out for my production guys.

Cheers,
Justin

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Justin! Sorry for the late response! Are you still having issues with the mirror column? If so, hit us up at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to work this out with you!
